body:
The bug has been fixed in PR#3690 of [moonbitlang/core](https://github.com/moonbitlang/core). Accordingly, the workaround applied in this repository will be removed.

**Workaround removal schedule**

PR#3690 was merged on 2026-06-17, but the current moon toolchain (`0.1.20260608`, built on 2026-06-08) does not yet include the fix. The workaround in `internal/std_math/std_math.mbt` will be removed once a new moon release that bundles the corrected `@math.cosh` is available.
